qa_pair.question: What is the MCP server name returned by initialize?
How many tools are exposed by tools/list?
What is the exact name of the tool that parses a supported video URL and returns metadata?
How many resources are exposed by resources/list?
Which resource URI contains the developer overview document?
How many prompts are exposed by prompts/list?
Which prompt should be used to create a third-party integration plan for ClipVerse?
Which prompt requires a video URL argument to guide download preparation?
Which MCP method should be called to retrieve the server's resource inventory?
What protocol version string does initialize return?
